Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Now right click on the next waypoint in the series, and use the same menus to set the speed to Ahead 1/3. This will comprise the 'Drift' leg of the maneuver.

You can repeat this process as much as you'd like in any particular direction, but let's continue moving JDS Kikuzuki in a line to the northeast (approximately bearing 045) while JDS Hiei continues at a set speed of Ahead 1/3 to the northeast as well.
